  Refactor 2: "Toggle lazy const" (refactor.rewrite.effect.toggleLazyConst)

=== Refactor Application Results ===

=== [R1] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_prepare.ts ---
// refactor: 18:14-18:27, 20:14-20:29, 25:14-25:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer, pipe } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const pipe(prepareSimple) = UserRepository.Default

export const prepareWithPipe = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default)
)

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default),
  Layer.merge(DbConnection.Default)
)


=== [R1] Refactor 1: "Toggle type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_prepare.ts ---
// refactor: 18:14-18:27, 20:14-20:29, 25:14-25:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer, pipe } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const prepareSimple: Layer.Layer<UserRepository, never, Cache | DbConnection> = UserRepository.Default

export const prepareWithPipe = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default)
)

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default),
  Layer.merge(DbConnection.Default)
)


=== [R1] Refactor 2: "Toggle lazy const" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_prepare.ts ---
// refactor: 18:14-18:27, 20:14-20:29, 25:14-25:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer, pipe } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const prepareSimple = () => UserRepository.Default

export const prepareWithPipe = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default)
)

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default),
  Layer.merge(DbConnection.Default)
)


=== [R2] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_prepare.ts ---
// refactor: 18:14-18:27, 20:14-20:29, 25:14-25:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer, pipe } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const prepareSimple = UserRepository.Default

export const pipe(prepareWithPipe) = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default)
)

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default),
  Layer.merge(DbConnection.Default)
)


=== [R2] Refactor 1: "Toggle type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_prepare.ts ---
// refactor: 18:14-18:27, 20:14-20:29, 25:14-25:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer, pipe } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const prepareSimple = UserRepository.Default

export const prepareWithPipe: Layer.Layer<Cache | UserRepository, never, DbConnection | FileSystem> = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default)
)

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default),
  Layer.merge(DbConnection.Default)
)


=== [R2] Refactor 2: "Toggle lazy const" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_prepare.ts ---
// refactor: 18:14-18:27, 20:14-20:29, 25:14-25:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer, pipe } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const prepareSimple = UserRepository.Default

export const prepareWithPipe = () => pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default)
)

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default),
  Layer.merge(DbConnection.Default)
)


=== [R2] Refactor 3: "Prepare layers for automatic composition" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_prepare.ts ---
// refactor: 18:14-18:27, 20:14-20:29, 25:14-25:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer, pipe } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const prepareSimple = UserRepository.Default

export const prepareWithPipe = [UserRepository.Default, Cache.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<never /* Cache | UserRepository */>;

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default),
  Layer.merge(DbConnection.Default)
)


=== [R3] Refactor 0: "Wrap with pipe" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_prepare.ts ---
// refactor: 18:14-18:27, 20:14-20:29, 25:14-25:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer, pipe } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const prepareSimple = UserRepository.Default

export const prepareWithPipe = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default)
)

export const pipe(prepareSomewhatComplex) = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default),
  Layer.merge(DbConnection.Default)
)


=== [R3] Refactor 1: "Toggle type annotation" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_prepare.ts ---
// refactor: 18:14-18:27, 20:14-20:29, 25:14-25:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer, pipe } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const prepareSimple = UserRepository.Default

export const prepareWithPipe = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default)
)

export const prepareSomewhatComplex: Layer.Layer<Cache | DbConnection | UserRepository, never, DbConnection | FileSystem> = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default),
  Layer.merge(DbConnection.Default)
)


=== [R3] Refactor 2: "Toggle lazy const" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_prepare.ts ---
// refactor: 18:14-18:27, 20:14-20:29, 25:14-25:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer, pipe } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const prepareSimple = UserRepository.Default

export const prepareWithPipe = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default)
)

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = () => pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default),
  Layer.merge(DbConnection.Default)
)


=== [R3] Refactor 3: "Prepare layers for automatic composition" ===

--- file:///.src/layerMagic_prepare.ts ---
// refactor: 18:14-18:27, 20:14-20:29, 25:14-25:36
// @effect-v3
import { Effect, Layer, pipe } from "effect"

class DbConnection extends Effect.Service<DbConnection>()("DbConnection", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class FileSystem extends Effect.Service<FileSystem>()("FileSystem", {
  succeed: {}
}) {}
class Cache extends Effect.Service<Cache>()("Cache", {
  effect: Effect.as(FileSystem, {})
}) {}
class UserRepository extends Effect.Service<UserRepository>()("UserRepository", {
  effect: Effect.as(Effect.zipRight(DbConnection, Cache), {})
}) {}

export const prepareSimple = UserRepository.Default

export const prepareWithPipe = pipe(
  UserRepository.Default,
  Layer.provideMerge(Cache.Default)
)

export const prepareSomewhatComplex = [UserRepository.Default, Cache.Default, DbConnection.Default] as any as Layer.Layer<never /* Cache | DbConnection | UserRepository */>;
